updater.readyBody: Restart the app to apply the update.
updater.upToDateBody: You have the latest version of Nevo.
updater.errorBody: Couldn't check or install the update. Please try again later.

welcome.title: Welcome to
welcome.subtitle: A quiet, local-first workspace for thinking, writing, and connecting ideas. Your notes stay on your device — always.
welcome.createSub: Start fresh — pick a folder, choose a template.
welcome.openSub: Point Nevo at any folder on disk.

create.title: Create your workspace
create.subtitle: Pick a name, a colour, and where to keep it. You can rename or move it later.
create.sideBody: Workspaces are plain folders on disk. You can copy them, sync them with iCloud or Dropbox, and open them in any text editor.
create.nameHint: Shown in the sidebar and across the app
create.iconHint: Swap any time from workspace settings
create.locationHint: Where files live on your machine
create.templateHint: Optional — adds a few starter pages

open.title: Open a workspace
open.subtitle: Pick from recent, browse for a folder, or drop one anywhere in this window.
open.dropHint: Drop a folder anywhere in this window to open it.
open.removeRecentConfirm: Remove "{name}" from recents? Files stay on disk.
open.deleteStorageConfirm: Delete "{name}"? This action can't be undone.
open.deleteFailed: Could not delete the storage. Please try again.

workspace.emptySubtitle: Create a note or choose one from the sidebar to start writing.
workspace.emptyFolderSubtitle: This folder has no notes yet. Create one to begin.

trash.title: Trash
trash.deletePermanentlyConfirm: Are you sure you want to permanently delete this note? This action cannot be undone.
trash.emptyConfirm: Are you sure you want to empty the trash? All items will be permanently deleted.

titlebarSearch.loading: Searching note content across the workspace...
titlebarSearch.idleDescription: Search notes, folders, note blocks, and settings from one field.
titlebarSearch.emptyDescription: Try a shorter term or search for a note title, block phrase, or setting name.

history.title: File history
history.restoreConfirm: Restore this snapshot to the live note?

states.noFiles: No live notes with history yet.
states.noFileSelected: Select a note to browse its history.
states.noSnapshotSelected: Select a version to preview it.
states.noDiff: No visible differences between the current note and this snapshot.

errors.noWorkspace: Open a workspace to browse history.
errors.loadCurrent: Failed to load the current note for comparison.

templates.title: Templates
templates.subtitle: Choose a preset or workspace template, then fill any fields.
templates.editorSubtitle: Template text supports date, time, note title, workspace name, custom fields, and a cursor marker.
templates.name: Name

errors.nameRequired: Template name and identifier are required.
errors.invalidId: Use only letters, numbers, hyphens, and underscores in the template identifier.
errors.contentDoc: Template content must be a document.

language.title: Application language
language.description: Global app language used across onboarding, settings, and the workspace shell

startupView.title: Startup view
startupView.description: The editor is live today. Table, kanban, and graph remain roadmap targets.

restoreLastContext.title: Restore last context
restoreLastContext.description: Reopen the last folder or note for this workspace

deleteConfirmations.title: Delete confirmations
deleteConfirmations.description: Require a confirmation prompt for destructive actions
deleteConfirmations.panelDescription: Require a prompt before destructive tree actions

appearance.description: Visual shell preferences — app-wide settings and workspace style.

mode.title: Mode
mode.description: Global app preference saved in AppConfig

themeSchedule.title: Auto theme schedule
themeSchedule.description: Switch between light and dark by the clock. Overrides the mode above while active.

accent.title: Accent colour
accent.description: Used for selections, focus rings, and links

reducedMotion.title: Motion
reducedMotion.description: Control animation intensity across the shell

scrollbarVisibility.title: Scrollbars
scrollbarVisibility.description: How scrollbars appear across the app

surfaceStyle.title: Surface style
surfaceStyle.description: How glassy or solid UI panels appear

editorFont.title: Editor font
editorFont.description: Typeface used for the writing surface

interfaceZoom.title: Interface zoom
interfaceZoom.description: Scale the entire app interface up or down

reduceTransparency.title: Reduce transparency
reduceTransparency.description: Turn off background blur on panels for clarity and performance

interfaceRoundness.title: Corner roundness
interfaceRoundness.description: How rounded panels, buttons, and inputs appear

editor.description: Block behaviour, typography rhythm, and writing-flow defaults.

preview.label: Live preview
preview.heading: A subsection heading
preview.body: Long-form body text — the centred reading column you'll spend most of your time in. Adjust a control and this panel reflects the actual editor tone rather than a generic form.

documentWidth.title: Document width
documentWidth.description: Width of the centred reading column
documentWidth.panelDescription: Width of the centred reading column

fontSize.title: Editor font size
fontSize.description: Typography scale used in the writing surface
fontSize.panelDescription: Current body text scale in pages

spellcheck.title: Spellcheck
spellcheck.description: Uses native system spellcheck dictionaries when available

slashCommands.title: Slash commands
slashCommands.description: Enable / command suggestions in the editor

smoothScrolling.title: Smooth scrolling
smoothScrolling.panelDescription: Controls the document scroll behaviour inside the editor pane

markdownShortcuts.title: Markdown shortcuts
markdownShortcuts.description: Auto-convert markdown patterns to rich blocks

focusMode.title: Focus mode
focusMode.description: Soft: gently dims secondary chrome while writing

typewriterScrolling.title: Typewriter scrolling
typewriterScrolling.description: Keep the active block near the centre of the viewport while typing

activeBlockEmphasis.title: Active block emphasis
activeBlockEmphasis.description: Slightly dim adjacent blocks to focus attention on the current one

caretAnimation.title: Caret animation
caretAnimation.description: Controls cursor blinking behaviour inside the editor

tabKeyBehavior.title: Tab key
tabKeyBehavior.description: Indent: tab indents lists and moves table cells. Focus: tab exits the editor

autosavePolicy.title: Autosave
autosavePolicy.description: Immediate: save after each change. On idle: save when the window loses focus

pasteBehavior.title: Paste behaviour
pasteBehavior.description: Smart: preserve rich formatting. Plain text: strip formatting, keep line breaks

slashMenuHints.title: Slash menu hints
slashMenuHints.description: Show category and shortcut hints inside the slash command menu

editorStats.title: Word count
editorStats.description: Show word and character count in the bottom-right corner of the editor

typewriterPosition.title: Cursor position
typewriterPosition.description: Target viewport position kept in view while typewriter scrolling is active

workspace.description: Workspace identity, structure, and default behaviors.

descriptionField.title: Description
descriptionField.description: Short summary shown on the workspace card

identity.title: Workspace identity
identity.description: Rename the workspace and update its glyph or gradient
identity.panelDescription: Rename the workspace and update its glyph or gradient after creation

workspaceType.title: Workspace type
workspaceType.description: Categorize this workspace by its primary purpose

customCss.title: Custom Styles
customCss.description: Enable custom.css file to customize this workspace's design

openLastVisitedSystemView.title: Restore last system view
openLastVisitedSystemView.description: Re-open the last visited system view (graph, history, etc.) on launch

rememberExpandedFolders.title: Remember expanded folders
rememberExpandedFolders.description: Keep folder expansion state between sessions

sidebarDefaultState.title: Sidebar default state
sidebarDefaultState.description: Whether the sidebar starts expanded or collapsed on launch

graphLabels.title: Graph labels
graphLabels.description: Show note title labels on graph nodes by default
graphLabels.panelDescription: Stored now, but the graph screen itself is still pending

rootNotesVisible.title: Show root-level notes
rootNotesVisible.description: Display notes in the workspace root in the sidebar

newNotePlacement.title: New note placement
newNotePlacement.description: Where new notes are created by default

newFolderPlacement.title: New folder placement
newFolderPlacement.description: Where new folders are created by default

defaultChildSort.title: Default sort order
defaultChildSort.description: How items inside folders are sorted by default

showEmptyFolders.title: Show empty folders
showEmptyFolders.description: Keep empty folders visible in the sidebar

defaultNoteIcon.title: Default note icon
defaultNoteIcon.description: Emoji or symbol used for new notes

defaultFolderIcon.title: Default folder icon
defaultFolderIcon.description: Emoji or symbol used for new folders

defaultNoteTitlePattern.title: Default note title
defaultNoteTitlePattern.description: Title pattern applied when creating a new note

newWorkspaceHomeNote.title: Create home note
newWorkspaceHomeNote.description: Auto-create a home note when setting up a new workspace

autoCreateStarterStructure.title: Starter structure
autoCreateStarterStructure.description: Generate an initial folder structure for new workspaces

graphEntryMode.title: Graph entry mode
graphEntryMode.description: Where the graph view starts when opened

graphScopeDefault.title: Graph scope
graphScopeDefault.description: Default scope for the graph view

historyDefaultRange.title: History range
historyDefaultRange.description: Default time range shown in the history view

ai.description: Bring your own model. Everything routes locally unless you opt in.

llama3.label: Local · llama3
llama3.description: Default local model for slash commands and inline actions

cloudGpt.label: Cloud · placeholder
cloudGpt.description: Reserved placeholder until cloud providers are wired in

defaultModel.title: Default model
defaultModel.description: Used for slash commands and inline actions

privacyMode.title: Privacy mode
privacyMode.description: Block all outbound network calls from AI features

slashCommands.title: Slash AI commands
slashCommands.description: Expose AI commands in the slash menu

contextSuggestions.title: Suggest from context
contextSuggestions.description: Surface contextual suggestions on highlighted text

cloudCredentials.title: Cloud credentials
cloudCredentials.description: Provider secrets stay out of `.nevo/settings.json` until secure storage exists

plugins.description: Extend Nevo without leaving the editor. Plugins run inside the workspace sandbox.

kanban.title: Kanban Boards
kanban.description: Enable Kanban board view. When disabled, boards are hidden but data is preserved.

templates.title: Templates
templates.description: Create notes from reusable workspace templates and insert template content from the editor.

vega.title: Vega-Lite Charts
vega.description: Embed interactive data charts using Vega-Lite specifications directly in notes.

markmap.title: Mind Maps
markmap.description: Render interactive mind maps from Markdown outlines directly in notes.

plugins.emptyDescription: Drop plugin folders into `.nevo/plugins` and rescan this workspace.

hotkeys.description: Editable keyboard commands in Nevo can be recorded here. Editor formatting shortcuts are fixed by the editor engine.

files.description: Workspace paths, cleanup operations, and cheap local diagnostics.

paths.title: Workspace paths
paths.description: Jump directly to the workspace root and hidden `.nevo` storage

snapshotRetention.title: Snapshot retention
snapshotRetention.searchDescription: How many snapshots to keep per note

trashRetention.title: Trash retention
trashRetention.description: How long to keep deleted notes before permanent deletion

orphanedAssets.title: Orphaned assets cleanup
orphanedAssets.description: Remove `.nevo/assets` files that are no longer referenced by notes

advanced.description: Sparse by design: expert toggles, raw files, and schema metadata.

experimentalGraphTools.title: Experimental graph tools
experimentalGraphTools.description: Advanced graph toggles without a separate graph settings section

developerLogging.title: Extended diagnostics logging
developerLogging.description: Writes warn, info, and debug diagnostics to rotating support logs while errors remain always-on

revealLogs.title: Reveal logs
revealLogs.description: Open the rotating support logs stored in the app data directory

rawSettings.title: Open raw settings JSON
rawSettings.description: Reveal the workspace settings file directly on disk

resetSettings.title: Reset workspace settings
resetSettings.description: Replace the current settings file with the v1 defaults

about.description: Built on Tauri. Local-first by default.
about.tagline: A quiet, local-first workspace for blocks, pages, and the threads between them.
about.openSourceBody: Tauri, Rust, ProseMirror, and the local workspace files on your disk. The app checks for updates and installs them once you confirm.

feedback.snapshotCleanup: Removed {removedFiles} old snapshot files and freed {bytesFreed}.
feedback.logsPathUnavailable: Logs path is not available yet.
feedback.revealPathOpened: Opened this path with the system app.
feedback.revealPathFailed: Could not reveal this path in the system file manager.
feedback.openFolderFailed: Could not open this folder in the system file manager.

graph.title: Graph
graph.noConnectionsHint: Link this note to others using [[note name]]
graph.emptySub: Create notes and link them with [[note name]] — they'll appear here as a network.

view.emptyHint: Add your first column and start tracking work, or start from a template.
view.noResultsHint: Clear search or adjust filters to bring cards back.

board.emptyColumn: Drop here or create a card

card.unsavedChanges: You have unsaved changes. Discard them?

calendar.noDateHint: Select a local date field from cards to use Calendar view.

automations.title: Automations & templates
automations.noAutomationsHint: Rules fire automatically when trigger conditions are met.
automations.noDepsHint: Link cards as "blocks" or "blocked-by" in the card modal to build a dependency graph.

groups.noFieldSelected: Select a field to build groups.

propertyPanel.title: Board properties
propertyPanel.impactColumns: {n} card(s) in deleted column(s) will be moved to the first surviving column.
propertyPanel.impactProperties: {n} card(s) with values in deleted propert(ies) will lose those values.
propertyPanel.validationNeedColumn: At least one column is required

boardModal.deleteConfirm: Delete {title}? All cards will be permanently removed.

signIn.title: Sign in to Nevo
signIn.subtitle: Sign in to create and join shared storages with your team. Your personal workspaces stay local.

storages.title: Shared storages
storages.empty: No shared storages yet. Create one to collaborate with your team.

members.title: Members
members.approveHint: This member is waiting for the encryption key. Grant access to let them in.

errors.noKey: You don't have the key for this storage yet — ask an owner or admin to grant access.
errors.generic: Something went wrong. Please try again.
